---
title: "{{title}}"
subtitle: "{{client}} ({{department}})"
author: "{{author}}"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left-body
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r pkg}
library(here) # To generate relative file paths
library({{table_engine}}) # Needed to display tables

# Create list of captions
tot <- readRDS(here("data/tot/tot.rds"))
caption_list <- setNames(as.list(tot$caption), tot$name)

# Define function to add caption to tables
add_caption <- function(x, cap) {
  x |>
    gt::tab_header(NULL) |>
    gt::tab_caption(cap)
}
```

{{<pagebreak>}}
